title: Hadoop MapReduce Security Package
description: The Hadoop MapReduce Security package provides classes for authentication and authorization in the Hadoop MapReduce framework. The core logic is contained in the UserGroupInformation class, which offers methods for authentication and authorization. The package also includes classes for authentication using tokens, such as the TokenSelector and Tokenizer classes. These classes depend on the classes in the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.security.token package. The package ensures scalability, maintainability, reliability, security, and performance.
raw_response:
TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Security Package

DESCRIPTION:
The Hadoop MapReduce Security package provides classes for authentication and authorization in the Hadoop MapReduce framework. The core logic is contained in the UserGroupInformation class, which offers methods for authentication and authorization. The package also includes classes for authentication using tokens, such as the TokenSelector and Tokenizer classes. These classes depend on the classes in the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.security.token package. The package ensures scalability, maintainability, reliability, security, and performance.
